text: {"acknowledges_specifics":false,"no_unverifiable_promise":false,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":false,"within_length":true,"justification":"The reply is generic and doesn’t address the user’s specific timeline or threshold caveat, it promises to “get it to you” (an unverifiable outcome), but it does direct to the in‑app Documents and note a follow-up, introduces no new policy, and stays concise."}
